headline: Lennar AGM: Directors Win, Pay Approved as Dual-Class Shareholder Proposals Fail
summary: Lennar (NYSE:LEN) held its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders virtually, with Executive Chairman and CEO Stuart Miller presiding as chair and Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary Katherine Lee Martin serving as secretary.
